title: Rysais Producers Co-operative
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Rysais Producers Co-operative''' was a large [[rysais]]-producing agricultural co-operative on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kothlis/Legends|Kothlis]]. Despite their large production quantities, the co-operative made very little profit and had to rely on government subsidization.

{{Company-stub}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 1996-10-XXF -->''[[Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide]]''
